tasks.label: inspect-pdf-lab9
inspect-pdf-lab9
args: & 'C:/Users/Acer/AppData/Local/Python/bin/python.exe' -c "from pathlib import Path; from PyPDF2 import PdfReader; p=Path(r'C:\Users\Acer\backend\Lab9-Integrating-Web-and-Mobile-UI-with-Django-REST-API-and-Data-Flow.pdf'); r=PdfReader(str(p)); print('PAGES', len(r.pages)); [print(f'\\n--- PAGE {i+1} ---\\n'+((pg.extract_text() or '').strip()[:5000])) for i,pg in enumerate(r.pages[:5])]"
